prompt_text:
### Demographics: 35-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 2 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Major Depressive Disorder
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~5 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 68.3 kg; Height 165.6 cm; BMI 24.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 114/78 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.6%; 9 months ago 7.6%; 6 months ago 7.4%; 3 months ago 7.3%; current 7.2%), FPG (12 months ago 193mg/dL; 9 months ago 173mg/dL; 6 months ago 187mg/dL; 3 months ago 168mg/dL; current 176mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 69.9kg; 9 months ago 67.9kg; 6 months ago 68.3kg; 3 months ago 68.1kg; current 68.3kg), Height (12 months ago 165.6cm; 9 months ago 165.6cm; 6 months ago 165.6cm; 3 months ago 165.6cm; current 165.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 24.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 114mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 77mmHg; 9 months ago 77mmHg; 6 months ago 77mmHg; 3 months ago 79mmHg; current 78mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 25U/L; 9 months ago 33U/L; 6 months ago 33U/L; 3 months ago 24U/L; current 29U/L), AST (12 months ago 16U/L; 9 months ago 17U/L; 6 months ago 17U/L; 3 months ago 21U/L; current 20U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 57mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; current 54mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 81mg/g; 9 months ago 73mg/g; 6 months ago 68mg/g; 3 months ago 67mg/g; current 75mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 75mg/dL; 9 months ago 69mg/dL; 6 months ago 68mg/dL; 3 months ago 75mg/dL; current 72mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 46mg/dL; 9 months ago 46mg/dL; 6 months ago 46mg/dL; 3 months ago 45mg/dL; current 44mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 99mg/dL; 9 months ago 114mg/dL; 6 months ago 111mg/dL; 3 months ago 117mg/dL; current 105mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.2g/dL; 9 months ago 13.3g/dL; 6 months ago 12.7g/dL; 3 months ago 12.7g/dL; current 13.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
